What is the total sales for 2024-10?: SELECT SUM(total_sales) FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_billing WHERE year_month = '2024-10' AND order_type = 'SHIPMENT'
Show me the total OTR sales for REGION_A: SELECT year_month, SUM(total_sales) as total_sales FROM [ods].[fact_monthly_sales_billing] WHERE year_month = FORMAT(GETDATE(), 'yyyy-MM') AND ru = 'REGION_A' GROUP BY year_month
Show me the total backlog sales in 2025: SELECT year_month, SUM(total_sales) AS total_backlog FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_billing WHERE order_type <> 'SHIPMENT' AND year_month = '2025-02' GROUP BY year_month
Show me the total backlog sales for CUST: SELECT SUM(total_sales) AS total_backlog FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_billing WHERE customer_parent = 'CUSTOMER_X' AND order_type <> 'SHIPMENT' AND year_month = '2025-02'
Find quantity sold to CUSTOMER_Y for 202: SELECT SUM(total_qty) AS total_quantity_sold FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_billing WHERE (customer_parent = 'CUSTOMER_Y' OR local_assembler = 'CUSTOMER_Y' OR final_customer = 'CUSTOMER_Y') AND order_type = 'SHIPMENT' AND year_month LIKE '2025%'
Show me the BB Ratio for GROUP_1 in Jan: WITH bill AS (SELECT SUM(total_sales) AS s FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_billing WHERE year_month = '2025-01' AND pbg = 'GROUP_1' AND order_type = 'SHIPMENT'), book AS (SELECT SUM(total_sales) AS s FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_booking WHERE year_month = '2025-01' AND pbg = 'GROUP_1') SELECT book.s / NULLIF(bill.s, 0) AS BB_Ratio FROM bill CROSS JOIN book
What is the Hit Rate % for UNIT_1.1 in 2: WITH Billing AS (SELECT SUM(total_sales) as s FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_billing WHERE year_month='2025-04' AND order_type='SHIPMENT' AND (pbg='UNIT_1.1' OR pbu='UNIT_1.1' OR pbu_1='UNIT_1.1' OR pbu_2='UNIT_1.1')), Budget AS (SELECT SUM(total_budget) as b FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_budget WHERE year_month='2025-04' AND (pbg='UNIT_1.1' OR pbu='UNIT_1.1' OR pbu_1='UNIT_1.1' OR pbu_2='UNIT_1.1')) SELECT Billing.s / NULLIF(Budget.b, 0) as Hit_Rate FROM Billing CROSS JOIN Budget
Compare sales for Distributors vs Direct: SELECT CASE WHEN g7_flag = 'Yes' THEN 'Distributor' ELSE 'Direct' END as channel_type, SUM(total_sales) as total_sales FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_billing WHERE year_month LIKE '2024%' AND order_type = 'SHIPMENT' GROUP BY CASE WHEN g7_flag = 'Yes' THEN 'Distributor' ELSE 'Direct' END
Measure 'Premium Segment' - what are the: SELECT year_month, SUM(total_sales) AS segment_sales FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_billing WHERE (pbu = 'UNIT_1.1' OR pbu_1 IN ('TYPE_A', 'TYPE_B')) AND order_type = 'SHIPMENT' AND year_month >= FORMAT(DATEADD(MONTH, -4, GETDATE()), 'yyyy-MM') AND year_month < FORMAT(GETDATE(), 'yyyy-MM') GROUP BY year_month ORDER BY year_month
